data.title: Add retry budget subsection to implementation-plan SKILL.md Step 3 and update task-execution.md
data.description:
## Story
d853-bf07 — Sub-agent retry budget with model escalation

## Goal
Add a `### Retry Budget` subsection to Step 3 of plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md instructing agents to embed retry budget metadata in generated task descriptions. Also update task-execution.md to reference the retry budget contract.

## Implementation

### implementation-plan/SKILL.md Step 3 addition
Add `### Retry Budget` subsection with the following content:
- Include in each generated task description:
  ```
  ## Retry Budget
  MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
  On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
  On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
  If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
  ```
- This metadata is read by the sprint orchestrator's Phase 4 dispatch logic

### task-execution.md update
Add reference to the retry budget contract: when a task description includes a `## Retry Budget` section, the sub-agent should respect the MAX_ATTEMPTS limit and pass diagnostic context on opus escalation.

## Acceptance Criteria
1. test_retry_budget_heading_present passes (heading present in Step 3)
2. test_retry_budget_sonnet_max_attempts passes (MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 + sonnet mentioned)
3. test_retry_budget_opus_escalation_mentioned passes (opus escalation with diagnostic context)
4. test_retry_budget_user_escalation_after_six passes (user escalation after 6 total)
5. All tests in tests/skills/test-implementation-plan-retry-budget.sh GREEN

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md (UPDATE — add ### Retry Budget subsection in Step 3)
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md (UPDATE — reference retry budget contract)

## Dependencies
Depends on 6e11-8934 (RED test must exist before implementation)
